name: Home Assistant (IoT)
description: Control smart home devices via Home Assistant. Turn lights on/off, adjust thermostats, check sensor readings, run automations, and query the state of any entity in your home network.

tools_summary.name: get_states
tools_summary.description: Get the current state of all or specific Home Assistant entities

tools_summary.name: call_service
tools_summary.description: Call a Home Assistant service (e.g. turn on lights, set thermostat)

tools_summary.name: get_history
tools_summary.description: Get the state history of an entity over a time range

tools_summary.name: list_automations
tools_summary.description: List all configured automations in Home Assistant

tools_summary.name: trigger_automation
tools_summary.description: Trigger a named Home Assistant automation

tools_summary.name: get_devices
tools_summary.description: List all registered devices and their entities

setup_instructions:
1. Install Home Assistant on your local network or use Home Assistant Cloud (Nabu Casa)
2. Go to HA → Profile → Long-Lived Access Tokens → Create Token
3. Set HASS_URL to your HA instance URL (e.g. http://homeassistant.local:8123)
4. Set HASS_TOKEN to the generated long-lived access token
